description: render the current page to a PDF file (read-only artifact)
rules: read-only — renders the page to PDF, mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli pdf` via the bundled npx wrapper
runs inside record_store so the PDF artifact is contained
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: pdf.json (audit log; the PDF lands in record_store when live).
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page (headless Chromium) to render a real PDF; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
